title: Text Chunker
description: A text chunking component that splits documents into smaller, semantically coherent
chunks for downstream processing such as embedding, retrieval, and LLM-based generation.
Supports multiple chunking strategies: recursive character splitting with configurable
separators, sentence-boundary splitting, and token-based splitting using tiktoken.
Each strategy supports configurable chunk size and overlap to balance context preservation
Receives documents and splits them into smaller chunks using the
configured chunking strategy. Each chunk is emitted as a separate
document with metadata tracking its position within the original.
Produces one document per chunk, with chunkId and parentId

recursive.title: Recursive Character - General-purpose, best balance of structure and size

sentence.title: Sentence Boundary - Splits at sentence endings for coherent chunks

token.title: Token-based - Splits by token count, ideal for LLM context windows

chunker.chunk_size.title: Chunk size
chunker.chunk_size.description: Maximum size of each chunk (characters for recursive/sentence, tokens for token strategy)

chunker.chunk_overlap.title: Chunk overlap
chunker.chunk_overlap.description: Number of characters or tokens to overlap between consecutive chunks

chunker.encoding_name.title: Token encoding
chunker.encoding_name.description: Tiktoken encoding name (only used with token strategy)

documents.page_content:
First paragraph with some content about machine learning.

Second paragraph about neural networks and deep learning architectures.

Third paragraph covering natural language processing and transformers.
